name: Actalent, Inc.
lede: Actalent runs four centers across four Indian cities. Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad and Pune, covering engineering & design, built over 21 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Actalent office in India. We map four, across four cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Actalent, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Actalent runs 4 verified centers across 4 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad, Pune), covering engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership

about.description: Actalent's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad and Pune, spanning engineering & design. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all eight decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Actalent operate in India?
faq.a: Actalent operates 4 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Actalent have centers in?
faq.a: Actalent's India footprint includes Bengaluru and 3 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Actalent run in India?
faq.a: Actalent runs engineering & design centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Actalent's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Actalent's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Actalent's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Actalent's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
